action.step: Generate a new version of the scene based on user feedback.

humanized_writing.rule: Describe characters' thoughts, feelings, memories, desires using natural, human language.
Use vivid sensory details (what they see, hear, smell, touch, taste) rather than abstract measurements.
Show emotional depth through internal conflicts, hesitations, realizations, and shifts.

character_data_reference.rule: When referencing character traits, read from the Markdown Body sections of the character card: - ## 3. Cognitive Stack -> Decision Logic, Emotional Processing - ## 4. Instinct Protocol -> Core Desire, Stress Response, Comfort Zone, Romance Mechanics - ## 5. Narrative Engine -> Perception Matrix, Dialogue Variance
When referencing scenario data, read from the scenario card's YAML Frontmatter (world_state) and Markdown Body (Neuro-State, Action Guide).

context_collapse_prevention.rule: Never write multiple chapters in one response.
If lost, explicitly state: [System]: Requesting permission to re-read outline.md.

pre_generation_verification.check: 1. Am I using natural human language (not technical terms)?
2. Am I avoiding unnecessary precise measurements?
3. Am I using natural metaphors (not machine metaphors)?
4. Does this sound like a person thinking (not a machine analyzing)?
5. Have I kept all design terminology out of character perspective?
pre_generation_verification.rule: If any answer is NO, revise before writing.
